description: First-run empty-state CTAs. Fresh-project views dead-end to the terminal: Graph shows "No items match the current filters" (wrong when the project is simply empty), Tree shows "No items to display", and Dashboard says "Run /compose in the terminal" (DashboardView.jsx:315) with no in-UI path. Add create-first-feature and onboarding CTAs to the empty states so a UI-first user is not stranded.
